'''âb-l-ng''' ('''kabalang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ultrapolish|ultrapolish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-l-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ultrapolish|ultrapolish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-l-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kabalang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibalang|thibalang]] || [[word:jibalang|jibalang]] || [[word:shibalang|shibalang]] || [[word:kibalang|kibalang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubalang|thuthubalang]] || [[word:jujubalang|jujubalang]] || [[word:shushubalang|shushubalang]] || [[word:kukubalang|kukubalang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubalang|thubalang]] || [[word:jubalang|jubalang]] || [[word:shubalang|shubalang]] || [[word:kubalang|kubalang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubalang|thubalang]] || [[word:jubalang|jubalang]] || [[word:shubalang|shubalang]] || [[word:kubalang|kubalang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebalang|thebalang]] || [[word:jebalang|jebalang]] || [[word:shebalang|shebalang]] || [[word:kebalang|kebalang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobalang|thothobalang]] || [[word:jojobalang|jojobalang]] || [[word:shoshobalang|shoshobalang]] || [[word:kokobalang|kokobalang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobalang|thobalang]] || [[word:jobalang|jobalang]] || [[word:shobalang|shobalang]] || [[word:kobalang|kobalang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobalang|thobalang]] || [[word:jobalang|jobalang]] || [[word:shobalang|shobalang]] || [[word:kobalang|kobalang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbalang|thĂŠbalang]] || [[word:jĂŠbalang|jĂŠbalang]] || [[word:shĂŠbalang|shĂŠbalang]] || [[word:kĂŠbalang|kĂŠbalang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabalang|thathabalang]] || [[word:jajabalang|jajabalang]] || [[word:shashabalang|shashabalang]] || [[word:kakabalang|kakabalang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabalang|thabalang]] || [[word:jabalang|jabalang]] || [[word:shabalang|shabalang]] || [[word:kabalang|kabalang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabalang|thabalang]] || [[word:jabalang|jabalang]] || [[word:shabalang|shabalang]] || [[word:kabalang|kabalang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabalang|shabalang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabalang|goshabalang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabalang|gokishabalang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabalangnĂŒ|shabalangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabalangnknĂŒ|goshabalangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabalangnĂŒ|gokishabalangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabalangshĂ«|shabalangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabalangnkshĂ«|goshabalangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabalangshĂ«|gokishabalangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabalangro|shabalangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabalangnkro|goshabalangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabalangro|gokishabalangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabalangmu|shabalangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabalangnkmu|goshabalangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabalangmu|gokishabalangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabalangsher|shabalangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabalangnksher|goshabalangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabalangsher|gokishabalangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabalang|shabalang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabalangnkng|goshabalangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabalang|gokishabalang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabalangya|shabalangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabalangnkya|goshabalangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabalangya|gokishabalangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabalangyam|shabalangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabalangnkyam|goshabalangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabalangyam|gokishabalangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabalangnĂŒshĂ«|shabalangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabalangnknĂŒshĂ«|goshabalangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabalangnĂŒshĂ«|gokishabalangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabalangnĂŒro|shabalangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabalangnknĂŒro|goshabalangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabalangnĂŒro|gokishabalangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabalangnĂŒmu|shabalangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabalangnknĂŒmu|goshabalangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabalangnĂŒmu|gokishabalangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabalangshĂ«nĂŒ|shabalangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabalangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshabalangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabalangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishabalangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabalangshĂ«ro|shabalangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabalangnkshĂ«ro|goshabalangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabalangshĂ«ro|gokishabalangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabalangshĂ«mu|shabalangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabalangnkshĂ«mu|goshabalangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabalangshĂ«mu|gokishabalangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabalangronĂŒ|shabalangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabalangnkronĂŒ|goshabalangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabalangronĂŒ|gokishabalangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabalangroshĂ«|shabalangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabalangnkroshĂ«|goshabalangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabalangroshĂ«|gokishabalangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabalangromu|shabalangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabalangnkromu|goshabalangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabalangromu|gokishabalangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabalangmunĂŒ|shabalangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabalangnkmunĂŒ|goshabalangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabalangmunĂŒ|gokishabalangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabalangmushĂ«|shabalangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabalangnkmushĂ«|goshabalangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabalangmushĂ«|gokishabalangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabalangmuro|shabalangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabalangnkmuro|goshabalangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabalangmuro|gokishabalangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
